city.description: Provides the city where the sign-in originated and is determined using latitude/longitude information from the sign-in activity.

countryOrRegion.description: Provides the country code info (two letter code) where the sign-in originated.  This is calculated using latitude/longitude information from the sign-in activity.

geoCoordinates.description: Provides the latitude, longitude and altitude where the sign-in originated.

state.description: Provides the State where the sign-in originated. This is calculated using latitude/longitude information from the sign-in activity.
